root_text.an8.69:1.3: Khattiyaparisā, brāhmaṇaparisā, gahapatiparisā, samaṇaparisā, cātumahārājikaparisā, tāvatiṁsaparisā, māraparisā, brahmaparisā.
root_text.an8.69:1.4: Abhijānāmi kho panāhaṁ, bhikkhave, anekasataṁ khattiyaparisaṁ upasaṅkamitā.
root_text.an8.69:1.5: Tatrapi mayā sannisinnapubbañceva sallapitapubbañca sākacchā ca samāpannapubbā.
root_text.an8.69:1.6: Tattha yādisako tesaṁ vaṇṇo hoti tādisako mayhaṁ vaṇṇo hoti, yādisako tesaṁ saro hoti tādisako mayhaṁ saro hoti.
root_text.an8.69:1.7: Dhammiyā ca kathāya sandassemi samādapemi samuttejemi sampahaṁsemi.
root_text.an8.69:1.9: ‘ko nu kho ayaṁ bhāsati devo vā manusso vā’ti.
root_text.an8.69:1.10: Dhammiyā kathāya sandassetvā samādapetvā samuttejetvā sampahaṁsetvā antaradhāyāmi.
root_text.an8.69:1.12: ‘ko nu kho ayaṁ antarahito devo vā manusso vā’ti.
root_text.an8.69:2.1: Abhijānāmi kho panāhaṁ, bhikkhave, anekasataṁ brāhmaṇaparisaṁ …pe…
root_text.an8.69:2.8: Tatrapi mayā sannisinnapubbañceva sallapitapubbañca sākacchā ca samāpannapubbā.
root_text.an8.69:2.9: Tattha yādisako tesaṁ vaṇṇo hoti tādisako mayhaṁ vaṇṇo hoti, yādisako tesaṁ saro hoti tādisako mayhaṁ saro hoti.
root_text.an8.69:2.10: Dhammiyā ca kathāya sandassemi samādapemi samuttejemi sampahaṁsemi.
root_text.an8.69:2.12: ‘ko nu kho ayaṁ bhāsati devo vā manusso vā’ti.
root_text.an8.69:2.13: Dhammiyā kathāya sandassetvā samādapetvā samuttejetvā sampahaṁsetvā antaradhāyāmi.
root_text.an8.69:2.15: ‘ko nu kho ayaṁ antarahito devo vā manusso vā’ti.

translation_text.an8.69:1.3: The assemblies of aristocrats, brahmins, householders, and ascetics. An assembly of the gods of the four great kings. An assembly of the gods of the thirty-three. An assembly of Māras. An assembly of divinities.
translation_text.an8.69:1.4: I recall having approached an assembly of hundreds of aristocrats.
translation_text.an8.69:1.5: There I used to sit with them, converse, and engage in discussion.
translation_text.an8.69:1.6: And my appearance and voice became just like theirs.
translation_text.an8.69:1.7: I educated, encouraged, fired up, and inspired them with a Dhamma talk.
translation_text.an8.69:1.8: But when I spoke they didn’t know:
translation_text.an8.69:1.9: ‘Who is this that speaks? Is it a god or a human?’
translation_text.an8.69:1.10: And when my Dhamma talk was finished I vanished.
translation_text.an8.69:1.11: But when I vanished they didn’t know:
translation_text.an8.69:1.12: ‘Who was that who vanished? Was it a god or a human?’
translation_text.an8.69:2.1: I recall having approached an assembly of hundreds of brahmins …
translation_text.an8.69:2.4: the gods of the four great kings …
translation_text.an8.69:2.8: There too I used to sit with them, converse, and engage in discussion.
translation_text.an8.69:2.9: And my appearance and voice became just like theirs.
translation_text.an8.69:2.10: I educated, encouraged, fired up, and inspired them with a Dhamma talk.
translation_text.an8.69:2.11: But when I spoke they didn’t know:
translation_text.an8.69:2.12: ‘Who is this that speaks? Is it a god or a human?’
translation_text.an8.69:2.13: And when my Dhamma talk was finished I vanished.
translation_text.an8.69:2.14: But when I vanished they didn’t know:
translation_text.an8.69:2.15: ‘Who was that who vanished? Was it a god or a human?’
